name: date-picker
visual_summary: DatePicker is a component used to select a date. It consists of a trigger and a popover and is suitable for cases where a user needs to enter or select a date, such as booking a flight or a hotel room.
generation_prompt:

- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types
